name: Ad-Hoc Image Generation with References
description: Validates that the orchestrator successfully extracts user-provided reference image URLs and passes them correctly into the GENERATE_AD_HOC_IMAGE_BATCH_TOOL.

parts.text: Generate a new ad-hoc image. You MUST use the exact prompt string `A futuristic car`. Here is a reference image: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_jeans.png and another: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_sweater.png. The brand is Catalyst Shoes. Use the default product and character URLs: https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_jeans.png and https://storage.googleapis.com/jvidhi-agents/brand_configs/vantus/vantus_sweater.png. Do not ask for confirmation, just run it.
